历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 9123→19349→18819→22531→16198, showing significant volatility. Since 2022, the school line has been lowered due to Fujian-Taiwan cooperation and geology/mining majors. In 2025, it rebounded to about 16198, with a fluctuation range of about 6300 places in the past 3 years. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category (including Science) were 60→61→61→35→35 respectively. Since 2024, the plan has been reduced due to the reform of the college entrance examination model. In 2026, the plan is 33 students, a decrease of 2 students (-5.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 77th, stable in recent years (2021: 79→2026: 77), belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident). From 2025 to 2026, there are no reputation records for Fuzhou University. Douyin popularity ranking 88th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 220,000, exposure at a medium-low level, no high-attention signals. Chemistry A- (fifth round of discipline evaluation) is the only A- or above discipline at Fuzhou University, directly related to enrollment majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc., have high social popularity and are strongly recommended. Chemical Engineering and Technology belongs to the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials categories, with obvious social discouragement. Business Administration is clearly discouraged. Civil Engineering and Architecture are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province is about 218,700 (no subject-specific data). Estimated by the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67%, it is about 146,500, an increase of about 20.7% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 121,400. The candidate scale has significantly expanded, intensifying competition. Fuzhou.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16198, the 2026 plan reduction of 2 students (-5.7%), the estimated increase of about 20.7% in Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province, and the average school reputation and popularity, the significant growth in candidate scale is the main contradiction, driving the ranking number upward, while the enrollment reduction also has a small impact. After analysis, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for Physics Category is about 15843, with a range of 15343–16343.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Electronic Science and Technology
- Robotics Engineering
- Civil Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Electronic Information Engineering (Fujian-Taiwan Cooperation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Logistics Management
- Logistics Management (Fujian-Taiwan Cooperation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15343–16343, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. In Tier 1, majors like Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Electronic Information are highly competitive but have good employment prospects, suitable for candidates with rankings better than the lower limit of the range to aim for. Tier 2, including Chemical Engineering and Technology, although in a discouraged category, is associated with the school's advantageous A- discipline in Chemistry, making it a stable choice. Tier 3, including Business Administration and Logistics Management, has lower ranking requirements, suitable for candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range as a safety. Fujian-Taiwan cooperation programs have higher tuition fees, so family financial conditions should be considered.
